vertical_split_selection.sort_order: descending by non_pk_column_count, then table name

fragment_roles: rows where victim_age > 44.0 or is NULL

base_predicate_sqls: (("beat_number" = '002' OR "beat_number" = '001') OR (("beat_number" = '003' OR ("beat_number" = '005' OR ("beat_number" = '006' OR "beat_number" = '020'))) OR ("beat_number" = '004' OR ("beat_number" = '010' OR "beat_number" = '011'))))
fragment_roles: rows where beat_number = 002 + rows where beat_number = 001 + rows where beat_number = 003 + rows where beat_number = 005 + rows where beat_number = 006 + rows where beat_number = 020 + rows where beat_number = 004 + rows where beat_number = 010 + rows where beat_number = 011
rows where beat_number is NULL or not in {'002', '001', '003', '004', '005', '010', '011', '006', '020'} (catch-all 'OTHER' bucket)
collisions||vfrag=beat_number.fragment_role_A: rows where beat_number = 002 + rows where beat_number = 001 + rows where beat_number = 003 + rows where beat_number = 005 + rows where beat_number = 006 + rows where beat_number = 020 + rows where beat_number = 004 + rows where beat_number = 010 + rows where beat_number = 011
collisions||vfrag=beat_number.fragment_role_B: rows where beat_number is NULL or not in {'002', '001', '003', '004', '005', '010', '011', '006', '020'} (catch-all 'OTHER' bucket)

base_predicate_sqls: ("party_safety_equipment_1" = 'air bag deployed' OR ("party_safety_equipment_1" = 'unknown' OR ("party_safety_equipment_1" = 'not required' OR ("party_safety_equipment_1" = 'other' OR ("party_safety_equipment_1" = 'none in vehicle' OR ("party_safety_equipment_1" = 'lap belt used' OR "party_safety_equipment_1" = 'driver, motorcycle helmet used'))))))

("party_safety_equipment_1" IS NULL OR "party_safety_equipment_1" NOT IN ('air bag not deployed', 'lap/shoulder harness used', 'air bag deployed', 'unknown', 'not required', 'other', 'none in vehicle', 'lap belt used', 'driver, motorcycle helmet used'))
fragment_roles: rows where party_safety_equipment_1 = air bag not deployed
rows where party_safety_equipment_1 = lap/shoulder harness used

rows where party_safety_equipment_1 = air bag deployed + rows where party_safety_equipment_1 = unknown + rows where party_safety_equipment_1 = not required + rows where party_safety_equipment_1 = other + rows where party_safety_equipment_1 = none in vehicle + rows where party_safety_equipment_1 = lap belt used + rows where party_safety_equipment_1 = driver, motorcycle helmet used

rows where party_safety_equipment_1 is NULL or not in {'air bag not deployed', 'lap/shoulder harness used', 'air bag deployed', 'unknown', 'not required', 'other', 'none in vehicle', 'lap belt used', 'driver, motorcycle helmet used'} (catch-all 'OTHER' bucket)
parties||vfrag=cellphone_in_use.fragment_role_A: rows where party_safety_equipment_1 = air bag not deployed
parties||vfrag=cellphone_in_use.fragment_role_B: rows where party_safety_equipment_1 = lap/shoulder harness used

relocation_engine_debug.pair_weight_meaning: Weights count co-occurrences of two fragments (from different original tables) inside workload queries that already span 2+ locals. They rank relocation candidates; they do not equal the number of queries that will become single-local after a move.
